hero_subtitle: No more brand walls. No more distance gaps. High-fidelity voice communication for every rider, regardless of their device. Uniting the pack through pure technology.
data_deletion_intro: You have the right to request the deletion of your personal data stored by Helmove. If you proceed with this request, we will permanently remove your account, ride logs, social posts, and telemetry data from our servers.
data_deletion_warning: This action cannot be undone. Once your data is deleted, you will lose access to all your saved routes and rider profile statistics. If you wish to use Helmove again in the future, you will need to create a new account from scratch.
reason_placeholder: Tell us why you are leaving...
social_heart_subtitle: Helmove® isn't just about hearing your pack—it's about remembering every mile and connecting with riders worldwide.
ride_logs_desc: A ride is more than just miles; it's a story. Share photos from the summit, write about the hidden curves, and pin your memories to the map for the community to see.
rider_profiles_desc: Create a public profile, connect with riders worldwide, and discover local meetups and shared routes.
global_challenges_desc: Compete in weekly distance or elevation challenges. Climb the leaderboard and earn exclusive digital badges.
hardware_sync_desc: Pair your HELMIC™ unit for real-time telemetry syncing and instant voice-to-text ride logging.
hardware_intro: Designed by Bugsten to turn any helmet into a high-end communication hub. Unrivaled micro-processing for noise cancellation, bringing studio-quality fidelity to the chaos of the road.
bt_limit_desc: Why does your music sound like a 90s radio the moment you speak through your intercom? Because Bluetooth technology cannot simultaneously transmit microphone data and high-fidelity music (A2DP). This isn't a software bug; it's the physical limit of Bluetooth.
bt_bypass_desc: HELMIC™ physically shatters this limit. It dedicates your helmet speakers solely to High-Fidelity (Hi-Fi) music playback, while routing your microphone traffic through its own dedicated, noise-canceling micro-processor.
dedicated_link_desc: Because true audio quality makes no compromises. By establishing a dedicated physical or lossless link to your device, HELMIC™ rescues your microphone data from the Bluetooth bottleneck.
studio_music_desc: Your bass and treble remain pristine. Listen to the symphony without drops, even while you speak.
voice_isolation_desc: Wind and engine roar are eliminated. HELMIC's micro-processor isolates your voice with absolute studio clarity.
pro_discipline_desc: An Ultra-Low Latency architecture preferred by elite riders, eliminating the degradation of standard wireless networks.

telemetry.description: Don't just show where you've been; show how you conquered it. Automatically overlay lean angles, G-force, and altitude data onto your shared photos and videos. Turn every post into a high-tech ride report.

tech_specs.feature_tandem_desc: Engineered for high-speed intercepts. Helmove’s dedicated P2P protocol isolates the noise, delivering a direct link between the Lead and the Wingman. Absolute clarity when it matters most. Just crystal-clear communication optimized for highway wind noise and roaring engines.
tech_specs.feature_group_desc: Connect up to unlimited riders in a single room. Dynamic auto-reconnect ensures that if someone falls behind, they automatically re-join the pack once in range.
tech_specs.feature_social_desc: Capture and share live snippets while you're still on the road. The system integrates with your media to allow quick posting with telemetry data included.

philosophy_description: We believe the road shouldn't have borders, and neither should your voice. Helmove® was born from the frustration of proprietary intercoms and 'closed-loop' systems that force you to buy the same brand as your friends. Our mission is to break those chains.
philosophy_cross_brand_desc: Enables seamless, unlimited connectivity across all intercom brands.
philosophy_zero_drops_desc: Dynamic mesh routing keeps the group live.

dynamic_routing.title: DYNAMIC ROUTING.
dynamic_routing.description: Pro-level route planning. Create, share, and lead. Whether you are an Admin setting the pace or a Captain coordinating the turn, the route is synchronized for everyone in real-time.

app_links.title: Deploy Helmove
app_links.description: Join the most seamless communication network on the asphalt. Break hardware limits and download the power of zero-latency tactical riding with your group to your phone.

privacy_policy_page.intro: At Helmove, we take your privacy seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our mobile application and related services.
privacy_policy_page.section1_content: We may collect information about you in a variety of ways, including:
privacy_policy_page.profile_info: Profile Information: Your name, email address, and profile picture provided during registration.
privacy_policy_page.geo_location: Geo-Location Information: Real-time location data to enable group sync and route tracking. This is only shared with your group when "Ghost Mode" is turned off.
privacy_policy_page.media_content: Media Content: Posts, "jots," and photos that you voluntarily share within the community.
privacy_policy_page.device_data: Device Data: Technical information such as device ID, model, and performance logs for troubleshooting and app optimization.
privacy_policy_page.section2_content: We use the collected information to provide a smooth and secure experience:
privacy_policy_page.use_case_1: To facilitate voice sessions and user-to-user messaging.
privacy_policy_page.use_case_2: To enhance riding safety and group coordination during trips.
privacy_policy_page.use_case_3: To personalize your user profile and social feed.
privacy_policy_page.use_case_4: To monitor and analyze usage and trends to improve your experience.
privacy_policy_page.section3_content: Your data is never sold to third parties for advertising purposes. We only share information with infrastructure providers (like LiveKit for voice communication) using technical identifiers necessary to provide the service, or when required by law.
privacy_policy_page.section4_content: You have full control over your data. You can update your profile, toggle location sharing via privacy settings, or delete your account at any time to permanently remove all personal data from our systems.
privacy_policy_page.section5_content: If you have questions or comments about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

terms_of_use_page.intro: These Terms of Use constitute a legally binding agreement between you and Helmove concerning your access to and use of our mobile application and related services. By accessing Helmove, you agree to be bound by all of these terms.
terms_of_use_page.section1_content: Helmove is designed to enhance your riding experience, but your primary responsibility is the safe operation of your vehicle.
terms_of_use_page.safety_rule_1: You agree to use Helmove (especially Intercom and "Jot" features) only when it is safe and legal to do so.
terms_of_use_page.safety_rule_2: Hands-free operation is mandatory. Do not attempt to interact with the screen while the vehicle is in motion.
terms_of_use_page.safety_rule_3: Helmove is not liable for any accidents, injuries, or fatalities that occur while using the application. You use this service at your own risk.
terms_of_use_page.section2_content: By using the Application, you warrant that:
terms_of_use_page.rep_1: All registration information you submit is true and accurate.
terms_of_use_page.rep_2: You have the legal capacity (and a valid motorcycle license where applicable) to use the app in your jurisdiction.
terms_of_use_page.rep_3: You will comply with all local traffic laws and regulations.
terms_of_use_page.section3_content: Helmove allows you to post content (photos, "jots," route info). You retain ownership of your content, but you grant Helmove a non-exclusive, worldwide license to host, display, and share this content within the app's ecosystem. You are prohibited from posting content that is illegal, encourages dangerous riding behavior, or violates others' privacy.
terms_of_use_page.section4_content: You may not use the app to organize illegal gatherings, dangerous stunt activities, reverse engineer the code, or harass other riders.
terms_of_use_page.section5_content: We reserve the right to change, modify, or remove the contents of the Application at any time for any reason at our sole discretion without notice. We will not be liable for any modification, price change, or suspension.
terms_of_use_page.footer: Ride safe, stay connected. Helmove Team.

support_center_page.intro: Need help with Helmove or your HELMIC hardware? Our support team is here to get you back on the road.
support_center_page.tech_support_desc: Having trouble pairing with a specific brand or experiencing audio drops?
support_center_page.warranty_desc: Need to file a claim for your HELMIC unit? We've got you covered.
support_center_page.faq_1_q: Does Helmove work with Sena or Cardo?
support_center_page.faq_1_a: Yes. Helmove utilizes a universal bridging protocol that allows our app and hardware to connect seamlessly with any major Bluetooth or Mesh intercom brand on the market.
support_center_page.faq_2_q: Do I need an active internet connection for routing?
support_center_page.faq_2_a: Initial route calculation requires an internet connection. Once the route is synced to the group, the core P2P features will utilize available Bluetooth/Mesh frequencies even in dead zones.
